_comment_pool: Multi-IP + Multi-SNI pool settings (ported from SNI-Spoofing-HJ).
_comment_pool2: If both CONNECT_IPS and FAKE_SNIS contain more than one entry, all combinations are probed and the best ones are used automatically.
_comment_pool3: Set CONNECT_IPS / FAKE_SNIS to single-element lists to disable the pool and use the original single-target mode.
_comment_recycle: Recycling — periodically re-tests evicted IPs in quarantine and restores the healthy ones with a fresh history.
_comment_quarantine_scope: Which IPs are eligible for eviction/recycling: 'static' (only CONNECT_IPS from this file), 'dynamic' (only IPs found by discovery), or 'both'.
_comment_sni_evict_recycle: SNI eviction/recycling — mirrors the IP eviction/recycling settings above, but for the SNI axis. Weak SNIs are quarantined and periodically re-tested.
_comment_sni_quarantine_scope: Which SNIs are eligible for eviction/recycling: 'static' (only FAKE_SNIS from this file), 'dynamic' (only SNIs found by SNI discovery), or 'both'.
_comment_discovery: Dynamic IP discovery — scans Cloudflare CIDR ranges at runtime and injects fresh IPs into the pool.
_comment_sni_discovery: Dynamic SNI discovery — pulls candidate domains from Tranco/Majestic/Umbrella + a curated seed list, checks Cloudflare hosting, and probes with a real TLS handshake before injecting them into the pool.
